message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the south
The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 5 nights starting from thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should arrive by 13:15
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
